title: About
text:
About This Website
This website showcases my learning and projects in data analytics, Quarto, and business applications.
It highlights my ability to analyze data, create dashboards, and present insights effectively.

title: Projects
text:
This project demonstrates my ability to analyze data and create meaningful visualizations using R and Quarto.
Skills: - Data cleaning - Data visualization - Analytical thinking




This project explores consumer attitudes using survey data. The analysis highlights how different factors influence participation.
Skills: - Statistical analysis - Interpretation of results - Business insights





Ability to turn data into insights
Strong analytical thinking
Business-focused decision making





Developed a marketing repositioning strategy that introduced matcha products into gym environments as a healthier alternative to traditional energy drinks. The project focused on consumer targeting, brand positioning, and wellness marketing trends.
Skills: - Consumer behavior - Brand positioning - Marketing strategy
